docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAKESIDE MEDICAL BUILDING, LLC COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-05-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

LAW AND MOTION 301, A R G U E D AND THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF LAKESIDE MEDICAL BUILDING, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO 11/23/05 TO BE HEARD ON THE MERITS. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, REPORTER: JOYCE FONG CSR# 8620.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PLAINTIFF LAKESIDE MEDICAL BUILDING, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM NOV-21-05 HEARING SET FOR NOV-23-2005 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, A R G U E D AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF LAKESIDE MEDICAL BUIDING, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT REGARDING TENANT BEING ALLOWED TO STAY UNTIL DEC. 10, 2005 BECAUSE THE EVIDENCE IS CONFLICTING AS TO WHEN TENANT HAD TO SIGN LEASE FOR THE NEW UNIT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, REPORTER: JOYCE FONG CSR# 8620.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-02-2005 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Lakeside Medical Building, Llc'S Motion For Summary Judgment Continued From Nov-21-05
Off Calendar Nov-23-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Lafrenz, Esq. of Donahue, Gallagher & Woods, 510-4510544 for plaintiff and moving party LAKESIDE MEDICAL BUIDING, LLC
John Granucci, Esq of O'Donnell, Waiss, Wall & Meschke, 415-362-6068 for defendant and opposing party Wall Medical, Inc.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
PLAINTIFF LAKESIDE MEDICAL BUIDING, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM NOV. 21, 2005 IS DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT REGARDING TENANT BEING ALLOWED TO STAY UNTIL DEC. 10, 2005 BECAUSE THE EVIDENCE IS CONFLICTING AS TO WHEN TENANT HAD TO SIGN LEASE FOR THE NEW UNIT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, REPORTER: JOYCE LONG CSR# 8620. (301/ROBER/DM)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-21-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Lafrenz, Esq. of Donahue, Gallagher & Woods, 510-451-0544 for plaintiff and moving party LAKESIDE MEDICAL BUILDING, LLC.
John Granucci, Esq. of O'Donnell, Waiss, Wall & Meschke, 415-362-6068 for defendant and opposing party.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court MODIFIED its tentative ruling as follows --
PLAINTIFF LAKESIDE MEDICAL BUILDING, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO 11/23/05 TO BE HEARD ON THE MERITS. PARTIES WAIVE UNTIMELY IRREGULAITIES IN PLAINTIFF'S PROOF OF SERVICE AND OPPOSING PARTY'S PAPERS. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SUBMITTED PROOF OF SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, REPORTER: JOYCE LONG CSR# 8620. (301/ROBER)
